name: Cider Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Slab bacon, cut into 1/2 inch dice
3 lb Chicken, cut into 8 pieces (skin & fat removed)
Salt & freshly ground black pepper to taste
2 3/4 cup Hard apple cider or 2 3/4 cup Sparkling dry apple cider
4 sprigs fresh thyme or 1/2 tsp dried thyme leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. In a deep ovenproof skillet with a lid, brown bacon over medium-high heat for about 3 minutes and transfer to paper towels to drain. Pour off any fat in the pan.
3. Add 1/2 Tbsp of peanut oil to the pan and brown chicken over high heat for about 3 minutes per side. Transfer the chicken to a plate, season with salt and pepper, and set aside.
4. Add the remaining 1/2 Tbsp oil to the pan, reduce heat to low and add onions. Cook stirring occasionally until the onions are very tender and golden, about 25 minutes.
5. Stir in garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Pour in cider and brandy and bring to a boil.
7. Add prunes, bouquet garni, and the reserved bacon and chicken. Cover and bake until the chicken is very tender and no longer pink inside, 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Remove the bouquet garni. Taste and adjust seasonings before serving.
